title: Top Sri Lanka Destinations for Your Tour
intro: Explore the most popular destinations included in our Sri Lanka tour packages including Sigiriya, Ella, Yala Safari, Kandy and Galle.
sigiriya.title: Sigiriya
sigiriya.desc: Explore the famous Sigiriya Lion Rock and ancient royal gardens.
sigiriya.packages: Sigiriya Day Tour, 5 Day Tour, 6 Day Tour, 7 Day Tour, 8 Day Tour & 10 Day Tour
ella.title: Ella
ella.desc: Visit Nine Arches Bridge, Little Adam's Peak and Ravana Falls.
ella.packages: Ella Day Tour, 2 Day Tour, 4 Day Tour, 5 Day Tour, 7 Day Tour, 8 Day Tour & 10 Day Tour
yala.title: Yala Safari
yala.desc: Experience wildlife safari and see leopards and elephants.
yala.packages: Yala Safari 2 Day Tour, 4 Day Tour, 6 Day Tour & 7 Day Tour
kandy.title: Kandy
kandy.desc: Discover the Temple of the Tooth and scenic Kandy city.
kandy.packages: Kandy Day Tour, 2 Day Tour, 4 Day Tour, 5 Day Tour, 6 Day Tour, 7 Day Tour, 8 Day Tour & 10 Day Tour
dambulla.title: Dambulla
dambulla.desc: Visit the famous Golden Cave Temple and cultural heritage sites.
dambulla.packages: Sigiriya & Dambulla Day Tour, 5 Day Tour, 6 Day Tour, 7 Day Tour, 8 Day Tour & 10 Day Tour
galle.title: Galle
galle.desc: Explore the historic Galle Fort and beautiful southern beaches.
galle.packages: Galle Day Tour, 4 Day Tour, 5 Day Tour, 6 Day Tour, 7 Day Tour, 8 Day Tour & 10 Day Tour
